ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar Nov-06-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Continued To Nov-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Crystal Long specially appearing for Robert Boland on behalf of Fleeta Rodriguez.

Ms. Long stated that they filed a declaration last week, that escrow has not closed yet, that she was advised by the title company by way of an e-mail dated July 6, 2017 that the buyer inserted a loose unattached cashier's check in the envelope with the closing documents, that the cashier's check was missed when the documents got pulled out, that the envelope and the cashier's check were shredded and that Bank of America will not issue a new cashier's check for 90-days. Ms. Long also stated that they are still dealing with issues regarding payment of the taxes for the San Francisco condominium, that there payment was rejected, that they have not been informed as to the amount owed, that she has left a message with Mr. Huie of the tax collector's office and that she has not heard back from him. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account is continued to November 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar Mar-13-2017 Continued To May-01-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Boland for petitioner Fleeta Rodriguez.

Mr. Boland Reported that escrow has not closed on the sale of the real property in San Luis Obispo county, as the title company required additional documentation which Mr. Boland was in the process of collecting. He said he expected to receive the remaining documents and provide them to the title company soon, allowing the sale to close. He requested that the status hearing be continued for sic weeks. The matter was continued to May 1, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Continued To Mar-13-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Boland for (administrator) Fleeta Rodriguez.

The Court stated that it needs the filing of the receipt for blocked account. Mr. Boland reported that escrow has not closed but they are close, that there were issues with the title company and the beneficiaries in the Philippines and that they would like a continuance to mid-March. The status on filing a receipt for funds into a blocked account was continued to March 13, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Aug-02-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Receipts Into A Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jul-12-2016 Continued To Aug-02-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Boland for (administrator) Fleeta Rodriguez.

The Court stated that we are here on status of filing receipts and that we are still waiting for funds on the 70th Street property. Mr. Boland reported that it is closing this week, that funds will be wired to the account, that there was a lien on the property that was still showing, that they had to track down the previous owner to clear it up and that they are expecting $27,000.00 or $28,000.00. The status on filing receipts of funds deposited in a blocked account were continued to August 2, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (Unit 35, Lot 134 (Apn 082-291-059), Unit 35, Lot 158 (Apn 082-291-061), & Unit 35 Lot 159 (Apn 082-2)
Off Calendar Jul-01-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Boland for and with (administrator) Fleeta Rodriguez.

The sale was confirmed at $52,800.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required as the funds will be placed in a blocked account. Status on receipt for deposit into a blocked account is set for August 29, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Boncato. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (33rd Street West And Avenue H-4, Lancaster, Ca)
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Boland for and with Fleeta Rodriguez.

The Court stated that there is an issue regarding each of the sales, that the buyer is listed as Velur Properties, LLC or assignee and that it needs to be a specific buyer. Mr. Boland clarified that the buyer is Velur Properties, LLC. The sale (for 33rd Street West and Avenue H-4) was confirmed at $100,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 12/29/15. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). The proceeds are to be deposited into a blocked account.
The sale (for 70th Street West and Avenue E-6) was confirmed at $32,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 12/29/15. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). The proceeds are to be deposited into a blocked account. Status of filing receipts for deposit into a blocked account is set for March 16, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rodrin. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (601 Van Ness Avenue, #426, San Francisco Ca)
Off Calendar Aug-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Boland for and with (administrator) Fleeta Rodriguez.

The Court stated that there is an issue of the contract being entered into prior to letters being issued. Mr. Boland stated that he has an addendum to the contract that he will be filing and presented a copy to the court to review. The Court reviewed the document, stated that it takes care of the issue, addressed the buyer regarding the above issue and the buyer answered the questions from the court. The sale for 100% interest was confirmed at $551,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 7/23/15. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required as funds will be deposited into a blocked account. Status on filing receipts for deposit into a blocked account is set for October 6, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Boland for Fleeta Rodriguez.

Mr. Boland stated that it will be difficult to obtain bond. The Court suggested limited authority. Mr. Boland also informed the Court that there is a lot in Southern California worth around $100,000.000 and the property in San Francisco. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration with limited authority (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
